2605.22769.title: Understanding Data Temporality Impact on Large Language Models Pre-training
2605.22769.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) are typically trained on shuffled corpora, yielding models whose knowledge is frozen at train time and whose temporal grounding remains poorly understood. In this work, we study the impact of pre-training dynamics on the acquisition of time-sensitive factual knowledge, focusing specifically on data ordering. Our main contributions are twofold. First, we introduce a comprehensive benchmark of over 7,000 temporally grounded questions and an evaluation protocol that enables analysis of whether models correctly associate facts with their corresponding time periods. Second, we pretrain 6B-parameter models on temporally ordered Common Crawl snapshots and compare them against standard shuffled pre-training. Our results show that sequentially trained models match shuffled baselines on general language understanding and common knowledge while consistently exhibiting more up-to-date and temporally precise knowledge. Temporally ordered pre-training yields improved factual freshness, while shuffled pre-training peaks on older data, possibly due to increased factual repetition. These findings, along with the release of our code at https://github.com/kyutai-labs/kairos , checkpoints, and datasets at https://huggingface.co/collections/kyutai/kairos provide a foundation for future research on continual learning for LLMs.
2605.22769.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）通常在隨機排列的語料庫上進行訓練，產生的模型其知識在訓練時被凍結，且其時間基礎仍然不甚了解。<lb/>在本研究中，我們探討了預訓練動態對於獲取時間敏感事實知識的影響，特別關注數據排序。<lb/>我們的主要貢獻有兩個方面。<lb/>首先，我們引入了一個包含超過7,000個時間基礎問題的綜合基準，以及一個評估協議，使得可以分析模型是否正確將事實與其對應的時間段關聯起來。<lb/>其次，我們在時間排序的Common Crawl快照上預訓練了6B參數模型，並將其與標準的隨機預訓練進行比較。<lb/>我們的結果顯示，按順序訓練的模型在一般語言理解和常識上與隨機基準相匹配，同時持續展現出更為最新和時間上精確的知識。<lb/>時間排序的預訓練提高了事實的新鮮度，而隨機預訓練則在舊數據上達到高峰，這可能是由於事實重複的增加。<lb/>這些發現，以及我們的代碼在 https://github.com/kyutai-labs/kairos 、檢查點和數據集在 https://huggingface.co/collections/kyutai/kairos 的發布，為未來對LLMs的持續學習研究提供了基礎。
2605.22769.author: Pilchen Hippolyte et.al.
2605.22769.authors: Pilchen Hippolyte, Fabre Romain, Signe Talla Franck, Perez Patrick, Grave Edouard
